resources.title: Alpha Library - Documents and Resources | Alpha Center

hero.subtitle: Study guides, corrected past exams, notes - quality resources created by our teachers to maximize your chances of success.

faq.title: Everything about our *documents*
faq.findAnswers: Quickly find answers to your questions

0.question: How to order a document?
0.answer: Click the 'Order on WhatsApp' button on the document page. You will be redirected to WhatsApp with a pre-filled message. Our team will respond quickly.

1.question: How to pay for my order?
1.answer: We accept Orange Money and MTN Mobile Money. After your order on WhatsApp, you will receive payment instructions.

2.question: How long to receive my order?
2.answer: Allow 24h for pickup at Alpha Center or 24-48h for delivery in Yaounde. For other cities, delivery takes 3-5 days.

3.question: Can I get a refund if I'm not satisfied?
3.answer: Yes, you have 7 days after receipt to request a refund if the content does not meet your expectations. Contact us on WhatsApp.

4.question: Are the documents updated?
4.answer: Yes, we update our documents every year with the latest exam subjects and program changes. Buyers receive updates for free.

5.question: Where can I pick up my order?
5.answer: You can pick up your order at the Alpha Center, located in the Omnisports neighborhood in Yaounde. The exact address will be communicated via WhatsApp.

testimonials.title: They *succeeded* with our documents

0.name: Kevin M.
0.content: The Alpha Center study guides really helped me structure my revision. The corrected exercises are very well explained.

1.name: Diane T.

appHero.subtitle: Full offline mode, all Cameroon entrance exams in your pocket. 1000+ corrected exercises, AI planning and peer community.
appHero.screenSubtitle: Prepare for your exam anywhere, even without internet

appFaq.title: Frequently asked *questions*
appFaq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the Alpha app.

q1.question: Is the app free?
q1.answer: The app is free to download with limited access. To unlock all content (full courses, exercises, mock exams), a monthly subscription is available starting at 5000 FCFA/month.

q2.question: How does offline mode work?
q2.answer: You can download the chapters you're interested in when you have a connection. Then you can study that content even without internet. A chapter weighs about 50 MB.

q3.question: How to pay with Orange Money or MTN MoMo?
q3.answer: In the app, go to Subscription then choose Pay. Select Orange Money or MTN MoMo, enter your number and confirm. It's instant!

q4.question: Is the app available on iPhone?
q4.answer: Yes! The Alpha app is available on iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play). It works on all recent smartphones.

q5.question: Can I use the app without being enrolled at Alpha Center?
q5.answer: Absolutely! The app is independent from the physical center. You can subscribe directly in the app, whether you're enrolled at the center or not.

q6.question: How to contact support?
q6.answer: In the app, go to Profile > Help. You can contact us via WhatsApp, email or through the built-in form. Response within 24h guaranteed.

appTestimonials.title: They *succeeded* with Alpha
appTestimonials.subtitle: Discover what Alpha app users have to say.

t1.name: Kevin M.
t1.quote: The Alpha app allowed me to study on the bus, during breaks... The offline mode is really practical in Cameroon where the connection isn't always stable.

t2.name: Grace N.
t2.quote: The app's MCQs are exactly like those of the FMSB exam. I was able to practice hundreds of times. The AI planning helped me get organized.

t3.name: Emmanuel T.
t3.quote: The app's forum is great. I was able to ask my questions and get quick answers from Alpha Center teachers. A real peer support community!

t4.name: Sandrine A.
t4.quote: Paying with Orange Money is so simple. No need for a bank card. And the biology exercises are really comprehensive for the CESSI exam.
